requirement_topic.en: Lead in Children's Apparel Components and Surface Coatings — CCPSA Regulations
requirement_topic.zh: 儿童服装部件和表面涂层中的铅——CCPSA条例
requirement_topic.zht: 兒童服裝部件和表面塗層中的鉛——CCPSA條例

summary.en: Under the Canada Consumer Product Safety Act, lead can be regulated through the Consumer Products Containing Lead Regulations, SOR/2018-83, and the Surface Coating Materials Regulations, SOR/2016-193. For apparel, risk areas include painted or coated snaps, buttons, zipper pulls, metal charms, printed or coated decorations, children's jewellery-like attachments, costume parts, and accessible coatings on accessories. Covered products and accessible parts must meet the applicable lead limits; surface coating materials and products with applied coatings are separately controlled.
summary.zh: 依据《加拿大消费品安全法》，铅可通过《含铅消费品条例》SOR/2018-83和《表面涂层材料条例》SOR/2016-193进行监管。对服装而言，风险区域包括涂漆或涂层按扣、纽扣、拉链头、金属吊饰、印花或涂层装饰、类似儿童首饰的附属件、化装服部件以及配件上的可接触涂层。覆盖产品和可接触部件必须满足适用铅限值；表面涂层材料及带涂层产品另有控制。
summary.zht: 依據《加拿大消費品安全法》，鉛可通過《含鉛消費品條例》SOR/2018-83和《表面塗層材料條例》SOR/2016-193進行監管。對服裝而言，風險區域包括塗漆或塗層按扣、紐扣、拉鏈頭、金屬吊飾、印花或塗層裝飾、類似兒童首飾的附屬件、化裝服部件以及配件上的可接觸塗層。覆蓋產品和可接觸部件必須滿足適用鉛限值；表面塗層材料及帶塗層產品另有控制。

standards_or_laws: Canada Consumer Product Safety Act, S.C. 2010, c. 21
Consumer Products Containing Lead Regulations, SOR/2018-83

summary.en: China's GB 31701-2015 and GB 18401-2010 focus on textile safety and may not fully cover lead in metal trims, painted components, decorative attachments, or surface coatings as Canadian CCPSA regulations do. Some Chinese product-specific standards or buyer protocols may include heavy metals, but standard fabric reports often omit hardware and coating lead. Exporters need a complete bill of materials and component test plan.
summary.zh: 中国GB 31701-2015和GB 18401-2010侧重纺织品安全，可能不能像加拿大CCPSA条例那样完整覆盖金属辅料、涂漆部件、装饰附件或表面涂层中的铅。部分中国具体产品标准或买家协议可能包含重金属要求，但标准面料报告常常不包含五金和涂层铅。出口商需要完整物料清单和部件测试计划。
summary.zht: 中國GB 31701-2015和GB 18401-2010側重紡織品安全，可能不能像加拿大CCPSA條例那樣完整覆蓋金屬輔料、塗漆部件、裝飾附件或表面塗層中的鉛。部分中國具體產品標準或買家協議可能包含重金屬要求，但標準面料報告常常不包含五金和塗層鉛。出口商需要完整物料清單和部件測試計劃。

standards_or_laws: GB 31701-2015 — Safety Technical Code for Textile Products for Infants and Young Children (mandatory)
GB 18401-2010 — National General Safety Technical Code for Textile Products (mandatory)

gap.en: The main gap is that apparel compliance files often test fabric but not accessible trims and coatings. Children's apparel with metal, painted, or coated parts should be treated as a component compliance project: identify every accessible part, determine whether it falls under lead or surface-coating regulations, and test high-risk materials. Avoid assuming that a heavy-metal result for dyed fabric covers snaps, zipper sliders, badges, screen prints, coatings, or costume accessories.
gap.zh: 主要差距是服装合规文件常检测面料，却未检测可接触辅料和涂层。带有金属、涂漆或涂层部件的儿童服装，应作为部件合规项目处理：识别每个可接触部件，判断是否落入铅或表面涂层条例，并测试高风险材料。不得假设染色面料的重金属结果覆盖按扣、拉链滑块、徽章、丝网印花、涂层或化装配件。
gap.zht: 主要差距是服裝合規文件常檢測面料，卻未檢測可接觸輔料和塗層。帶有金屬、塗漆或塗層部件的兒童服裝，應作為部件合規項目處理：識別每個可接觸部件，判斷是否落入鉛或表面塗層條例，並測試高風險材料。不得假設染色面料的重金屬結果覆蓋按扣、拉鏈滑塊、徽章、絲網印花、塗層或化裝配件。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — applicable CCPSA lead and surface-coating limits are legally binding for covered consumer products, children's products, accessible parts, and coating materials
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory textile safety under GB 31701/GB 18401 for domestic products, but fabric-focused GB reports do not automatically satisfy Canadian lead or coating rules

source.publisher: Justice Laws Website / Government of Canada

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] For children's apparel, lead compliance must cover accessible trims, hardware, prints, coatings, and decorative attachments, not only fabric. Use CCPSA lead and surface-coating regulations to define the component test plan before shipment to Canada.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 儿童服装的铅合规必须覆盖可接触辅料、五金、印花、涂层和装饰附件，而不仅是面料。出口加拿大前，应依据CCPSA铅和表面涂层条例确定部件测试计划。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 兒童服裝的鉛合規必須覆蓋可接觸輔料、五金、印花、塗層和裝飾附件，而不僅是面料。出口加拿大前，應依據CCPSA鉛和表面塗層條例確定部件測試計劃。
